baselinePolicy.rule: Context and decisions must remain anchored to OMNISKILL v2 baseline behavior unless an approved migration delta exists.

compressionPolicy.rule: Retain decisions, constraints, acceptance criteria, and evidence references.
Drop resolved exploration paths and duplicated narrative.
Never remove safety requirements, policy rules, or release gates.
Prefer structured lists over prose to preserve signal density.
Replace large command output with checksum plus key findings plus artifact path.

toolUsagePolicy.rule: Use targeted tool queries (search, ranged reads, scoped validation) over full-dump operations.
Batch independent tool calls and avoid repetitive single-call loops.
Every major decision must reference at least one tool-backed evidence artifact.

contextQualityChecks.check: No contradiction between objective and pinned constraints.
Every open risk has owner and next action.
No handoff packet contains oversized raw output that can be represented as structured summary plus reference.

failureProtocol.condition: Repeated context drift detected in two consecutive handoffs.
failureProtocol.action: Pause execution, regenerate canonical summary, re-anchor prompts, resume only after acknowledgment.
